title: Starter Items
description: A fast and simple mod allowing you to set starter gear for players.
body:
Starter Items

---------------------------------------------

Have you ever wanted to give players starter gear but don't want to edit any files? Well this mod does just that. Introducing Loadout Customizer, a fast and simple way to give players starter gear. Great for any server you might want to make!

---------------------------------------------

Current Features:

- Fully customizable and easy to use screen to set player's starter gear.

- One simple command to do everything.

- Support for any mod

-------------------------------------------

Use the command '/starteritems loadout set' to open up the GUI for setting players starter gear.
Use the command '/starteritems message set' to open up the GUI for setting chat messages on join.
